title: Gorilla Heavy Duty White Grab Adhesive 200ml Tube – All-Purpose, Ultra-High Strength, Holds Instantly, 100% Waterproof & temperature resistant
features: ULTRA HIGH STRENGTH: GORILLA Grab Adhesive grabs virtually anything instantly. Heavier objects may require support. The flexible, gap filling formula provides a long-lasting, heavy-duty bond. even easier to use - no cartridge gun needed.

ALL PURPOSE: GORILLA Grab Adhesive can be used on a variety of DIY projects such as wall partitioning, bathrooms, kitchens, moulding, stone work, panelling, worktops, landscaping (including decking), flooring (including laminate) & more!
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: GORILLA Grab Adhesive is perfect for indoor and outdoor projects due to being able to withstand extreme temperatures, bond underwater and being 100 Percent waterproof.

GAP FILLING: This handy 200ml tube provides a long-lasting heavy-duty bond and the ability to fill gaps. This easy-to-use, flexible formula can be used on a variety of surfaces, holding instantly with a high strength bond.

FOR USE ON: The all-purpose way to bond building materials; it will grab virtually anything instantly. It can be used on wood, metal, stone, ceramic, glass, plastics (apart from polypropylene (PP) or pol hylene (PE) plastics), brick & concrete.
